cards.back: Model used to describe the 7 layers of data communication between devices in a network
Model used to describe the 4 layers of data communication between devices in a network, shorter than OSI Model
Layer 1 of the OSI Model, defines how data is transmitted over a network medium
Layer 2 of the OSI Model, ensures error-free transfer of data frames between two devices on the same network
Layer 3 of the TCP/IP Model, defines how devices access a network and interact with each other
